query: # The Impact of Digital Transformation on SME Performance

matches.title: Digital Transformation in Business: Opportunities and Challenges for SMEs in Indonesia
matches.abstract: This dataset contains primary data from a survey of 454 SME owners and managers in the Jabodetabek region (Jakarta, Bogor, Depok, Tangerang, Bekasi), Indonesia. This study aims to empirically examine the impact of digital transformation on SME performance using the Partial Least Squares Structural Equation Modeling (PLS-SEM) method. matches.title: Artificial Intelligence Adoption and SMES Performance in Southwest, Nigeria: A Moderating Role of Management Support
matches.abstract: In an era of rapid digital transformation, Artificial Intelligence (AI) has emerged as a strategic enabler of efficiency, competitiveness, and innovation for Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (SMEs). INTERACTION OF ENTREPRENEURIAL ORIENTATION, MARKET ORIENTATION, AND INNOVATION CAPABILITY ON THE FINANCIAL PERFORMANCE OF SMES IN QUEZON PROVINCE: A PLS-SEM APPROACH
matches.abstract: This study investigated the interaction of entrepreneurial orientation (EO), market orientation (MO), and innovation capability (IC) on the financial performance of small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) in Quezon Province, Philippines, using a Partial Least Squares Structural Equation Modeling (PLS-SEM) approach. matches.abstract: <h2><em><span lang="EN-US">This study examines the transformative impact of digitization on small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) and analyzes how digital technologies reshape business operations, customer relationships, and competitive positioning.
